# Brand Assets

This directory contains assets for Home Assistant Brands repository submission.

## Files for Submission

Place these files here before submitting to HA Brands repo:

### Required
- `icon.png` - 256x256px, transparent background
- `manifest.json` - Already created

### Recommended
- `icon@2x.png` - 512x512px, transparent background
- `logo.png` - Full logo with background
- `logo@2x.png` - 2x resolution logo

## Creating Icons

### Option 1: Use Tuya Official Branding
Download from: https://www.tuya.com/
Ensure you have permission to use the logo.

### Option 2: Create Custom Icon
Use tools like:
- GIMP (free)
- Inkscape (free, vector)
- Figma (online)

Design ideas:
- Bluetooth symbol + mesh network
- Smart bulb + BLE icon
- Tuya colors + mesh pattern

### Option 3: Use Material Icons
Base design on Material Icons:
- `bluetooth_connected`
- `device_hub`
- `lightbulb`

## Submission Checklist

- [ ] Create icon.png (256x256)
- [ ] Create icon@2x.png (512x512)
- [ ] Optimize PNG files (<100KB each)
- [ ] Verify manifest.json is correct
- [ ] Test icons look good on dark/light backgrounds
- [ ] Fork HA Brands repo
- [ ] Create brand directory
- [ ] Submit PR

See `BRANDS_SUBMISSION.md` for detailed instructions.
